name: Attack followed by Attack Response
notes: This rule detects when exploit or attack events are followed by typical responses, which may indicate a sucessful attack.
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Post Compromise Activities in order from the same destination IP from the previous sequence
conditions_text: when at least 1 of these BB:BehaviorDefinition: Compromise Activities, in order, with the same destination IP followed by at least 1 of these BB:BehaviorDefinition: Post Compromise Activities in order from the same destination IP from the previous sequence, within 1 hours
thresholds: when at least 1 of these BB:BehaviorDefinition: Compromise Activities, in order, with the same destination IP followed by at least 1 of these BB:BehaviorDefinition: Post Compromise Activities in order from the same destination IP from the previous sequence, within 1 hours
TD_list: APPLY Attack followed by Attack Response on events which are detected by the undefined system

AND when at least 1 of these BB:BehaviorDefinition: Compromise Activities, in order, with the same destination IP followed by at least 1 of these BB:BehaviorDefinition: Post Compromise Activities in order from the same destination IP from the previous sequence, within 1 hours
RED_list: Event name: Attack Followed by an Attack Response
Event description: The system has identified an attack that was followed by a common attack response.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should not contribute to the naming of the associated offense(s)
